summary: Completed testing of Observer MVP Update features. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend QR Sharing tab and Credits Overlay working correctly. Dashboard shows observer status per board.

issues: Toast message shows raw key 'save_success' instead of translated text (missing i18n key)

passed_tests: GET /api/settings/match-sharing - returns default values (enabled: false, qr_timeout: 60)
PUT /api/settings/match-sharing - admin can enable with qr_timeout=30
PUT /api/settings/match-sharing - admin can disable with qr_timeout=60
GET /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/observer-status - returns autodarts_mode, state, credits_remaining, pricing_mode
GET /api/kiosk/observers/all - returns all observer statuses with autodarts_mode
GET /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/overlay - returns visible:false when no session (board locked)
GET /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/overlay - returns visible:true with credits when session active
GET /api/kiosk/INVALID-BOARD/overlay - returns visible:false for nonexistent board
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/end-game with QR disabled - returns match_token:null, match_sharing_enabled:false
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/end-game with QR enabled - returns match_token (hex string), match_sharing_enabled:true
POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/unlock - creates session with credits, triggers observer start
POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/lock - closes session, triggers observer close
Board status changes correctly with unlock/lock operations
Frontend: Admin Settings has QR Sharing tab with toggle and save button
Frontend: QR Sharing toggle shows/hides QR timeout input field
Frontend: Dashboard shows observer status per board (Observer IDLE display)
Frontend: /overlay/BOARD-1 shows transparent when no session
Frontend: /overlay/BOARD-1 shows credits (SPIELE 5) when session active
action_items: Add 'save_success' translation key to /app/frontend/src/i18n/translations.js (minor i18n fix)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing BOARD-1 and BOARD-2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Observer MVP Update tested. Key features: 1) Match sharing settings at /api/settings/match-sharing (GET/PUT), default disabled. 2) Conditional match_token in end-game response based on match_sharing.enabled. 3) Observer status extended with credits_remaining, pricing_mode at /api/kiosk/{boardId}/observer-status. 4) Credits overlay at /overlay/:boardId polls /api/kiosk/{boardId}/overlay every 3s. 5) Board unlock triggers observer start, lock triggers observer close. Dashboard shows Observer status (IDLE/IN_GAME/etc) per board card.
